name: VECTOR Spark UP
comment:
Lightmaxx VECTOR Spark UP: The main features of the lightmaXX VECTOR Spark UP! include:

-Spark Effect
-Produces up to 5m-High Spray Fountains with a Special -Granulate (Environmentally Friendly)
-Aluminium Housing
-2x DMX Channels
-Warm-Up Time: 5 mins
-10-15 mins Effect Time per Filling
-Outlet Height Adjustable: 1-5m
-Control Panel with Display and Status Indicators
-Mains Connection with Loop-Through Output for max. 6x --Devices via Power Twist Sockets
-Integrated Temperature Sensor & Overcurrent Protection
-Self-Cleaning Function
-Power Supply: AC 220-240V, 50Hz
-Power Consumption: 650W
-Fuse: 110V/10A, 220V/6A
-Ambient Temperature Range: -5 to +45°C
-Connections: DMX 3-Pin In/Output, Power Twist In/Output
-Total Connected Load: 650W
-EAN: 4250660491243
-Includes: Remote Control
-Dimensions (WxHxD); 185 x 185 x 252mm
-Weight: 5.9kg
